name: law firm paralegals processing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For law firm paralegals processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient management of contract signatures causes delays in contract finalization. We digitize and schedule signatures instead of manual tracking and scheduling of signatures via email.
problem_solved: Inefficient management of contract signatures leads to delays.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient management of contract signatures leads to delays.
